items.title: GK-P22 -- Sculpt brushes for SubD cages and triangle meshes
items.body: apply_sculpt_brush(vertices, faces, SculptStroke) -> MeshSculptResult in kerf_cad_core.mesh_sculpt_brushes. 4 brushes: Inflate (along one-ring normal), Crease (inverted inflate), Smooth (first-order centroid relaxation), Pinch (attract to stroke centre). Wendland C2 falloff w(t)=(1-t^2)^2 (Wendland 1995). Auto-normals via area-weighted one-ring averaging. LLM tool mesh_sculpt_brush wired. 35 tests. Honest (v1): single-stroke stateless -- no undo stack, no stroke history, no dyntopo; smooth = unweighted first-order centroid only; crease = mesh-level inward inflate (not CC subdivision sharpness). Refs: Botsch-Sorkine 2008 S3; Sculptris/ZBrush brush math (Pixologic 2024).
